properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
We are proud to present this stylish two bedroom, two bathroom apartment in Landmark Pinnacle. Immaculately presented, the property comprises an open plan kitchen living area, two double bedrooms with built in storage, ensuite and main bathroom. Finished to a superb standard throughout, key features include stone worktops in the kitchen and porcelain tiles in the bathroom. 

Landmark Pinnacle is one of the most prestigious developments in Canary Wharf and residents will benefit from 24 hour concierge, private gym, cinema, lounge, roof terrace and golf simulator to name a few of the world class facilities. It is ideally situated being only short walk to Heron Quays DLR station,  Canary Wharf Station for the Jubilee Line and Canary Wharf Pier for the Thames Clipper.With Crossrail arriving soon transport links are only set to get better. The Canary Wharf Estate is only a short walk away boasting an array of shops, bars and restaurants.

properties.title: Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
An exquisite, brand new two-bedroom apartment situated on the 12th floor of the popular Harcourt Tower building within the exclusive South Quay Plaza development. 

Designed for modern city living, the apartment offers a bright open-plan reception, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light and a contemporary kitchen. 

The home features comfort cooling and underfloor heating, providing year-round comfort. The bedroom is generously sized with high-quality finishes, and the modern bathroom is appointed with premium fixtures.

South Quay Plaza offers a 24-hour concierge service, exclusive resident's club lounge with sky bar, terrace and stunning views of the City. Residents also benefit from the use of a state-of-the-art gyn, spa, sauna and steam room as well as a swimming pool. In addition, there is a private screening room as well as co-working spaces.

Available Now | Fully Furnished | 36th Floor | Parking Available* | Massive Balcony | Breath-Taking Views | 24/7 Concierge | Cinema Room | Gym | Swimming Pool | WeChat: CLH-Consultant.

Available end of February, our 2 bedroom 2 bathroom apartment in Arena Tower. Formerly known as Baltimore Tower, the luxury apartments were built by Galliard Homes in 2017 and designed by architects Skidmore, Owings & Merrill.

 Spacious open plan living with exceptional outdoor space via a courtyard facing balcony which spans the entire apartment, set on the sixth floor.
Offers ample storage with cupboards in the hallway, housing a washing machine and the air filtering system. A modern kitchen equipped with built-in appliances including fridge freezer, microwave, dishwasher, electric hob and oven.ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ 

 Master bedroom with en-suite shower, second double bedroom and a family bathroom with separate shower and bath. Both bedrooms come with built-in floor to ceiling wardrobes. Also features engineered oak wood flooring, comfort cooling ventilation system, floor to ceiling sliding doors throughout and natural marble tiled bathrooms. 
Bedrooms are currently furnished with a standard double and king size bed with mattresses.

Arena Tower is in walking distance of Canary Wharf shopping plaza and One Canada Square, home to many global businesses, banks, insurance companies, boutiques, high-street retail shops, coffee shops, and restaurants. A short walk south of the development leads to the Isle of Dogs, Island Gardens, and Greenwich via the foot tunnel under the River Thames.

Canary Wharf is home to Jubilee Line, Crossrail, and DLR services, making commuting across London quick and convenient. The Crossharbour DLR Station is the closest rail option, only three stops from Canary Wharf, although many residents consider it within walking distance of Arena Tower.

This luxurious apartment features a meticulously designed open-plan living, kitchen area, a double bedroom with built-in wardrobe, a study room which can be bedroom, and a spacious family bathroom.

The apartment has a concierge service, a leisure and wellness center and a fitness center (with an outdoor hot tub), iGarden-an advanced shared workspace, supporting conference rooms and outdoor work areas, a game room with an independent soundproof karaoke room, a 20-meter swimming pool, a 56th-floor bar and lounge, and a terrace. It is worth mentioning that the 56th-floor bar is one of the highest residential bars in Europe. Residents can overlook Canary Wharf, the Thames, the City of London, etc., and enjoy a beautiful panoramic view.

Harcourt Tower is located in the heart of Canary Wharf. Canary Wharf has a beautiful environment, with multiple parks and cool blue riverside spaces, a total of 2.6 acres of green place, and complete supporting facilities for life, such as many internationally renowned hotels and more than 280 shops, cafes, bars, and restaurants. It is a shopping paradise, with everything from well-known brand stores, commercial streets to shopping malls. There are also many well-known cultural attractions near Canary Wharf, such as Tower Bridge, Royal Observatory and National Maritime Museum. In addition, there are many art centers, museums and theaters in the area, such as Canary Wharf Arts Centre, Museum of London and Royal Institute of British Architects.

properties.title: George Street, London, E14
properties.description:
Welcome home to 10 George Street, placing you at the heart of Wood Wharf. 

Our apartments offer cozy, modern spaces designed for comfort and ease so that you never miss a moment - from early morning coffees to sundowners on the terrace.
With shared lounges, south-facing terrace and plenty of amenity spaces to enjoy alone or with neighbours, 10 George Street is the perfect place to connect, unwind, and truly feel at home.

There's so much more to renting. Enjoy extensive Vertus+ amenity spaces and a programme of curated events hosted in these spaces. With the Vertus+ app our residents also benefit from access to partner perks by neighbourhood brands in Canary Wharf. Fancy a 20% skincare discount, or a drink on us? We have you covered.

AMENITY SPACES
- South facing terrace with BBQ
- Gym and immersive Fiit studio
- Private dining room
- Residents' lounge
- Self-service bar with coffee machine and wine dispenser
- Joint amenity spaces with 8 Water Street

EVENTS
- Wine Wednesday
- Cooking Masterclass
- Resident Book Club

BUILDING
- Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartments and building - easy to WFH, game, or stream your favourite show without glitches.
- We have a dedicated team on-site (engineers, concierge, building managers) here to help with any questions you have to make your move as stress-free as possible
- Pantree honesty market - so you can pick up essential without leaving your building
- Bring me boxes
- Apartments furnished by Camerich

PERKS
- Monthly exclusives on the residents' app
- Free Fiit membership - the #1 Rated Fitness App with hundreds of killer on-demand workouts with world-class trainers.
- Dry cleaning and laundry services
- Guest suites - fully-furnished suites for residents to book as an extension of their home when hosting more family and friends

NEIGHBOURHOOD
- Feel safe and secure on a private Estate - Canary Wharf.
- Convenient transport connections -Canary Wharf London Underground Station (Jubilee Line) / 3 mins travel*, Heron Quay station (DLR) / 4 mins travel*, South Quay station (DLR) / 8 mins travel*, Canary Wharf Crossrail Place (Elizabeth Line) / 10 minutes travel* (*approximate travel to stations).
- Immerse yourself in convenience and culture with 300 shops, bars and restaurants, 100 cultural events per year, and the UK's largest free-to-visit collection of outdoor public art. The Wharf also benefits from over 16 acres of landscaped parks, boardwalks and squares.

*Please note that all images, floorplans and particulars included are for illustrative and indicative purposes only. Individual features and layout may vary.
*Available for student let

Spanning over 871 square feet of internal space the property comprises two double bedrooms with built-in storage, main bedroom with an en-suite, the other with access to the family bathroom and a large open-plan living area with water views and access to the private balcony. 

The property features mood lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows, wood flooring, a fully integrated kitchen and waterside views. 

The development benefits from a residents lounge located on the 13th floor which includes a cinema room, rooftop terrace, private dining room, coffee machine and wine machine as well as having access to Third Space gym which is just opposite 10 Park Drive.

All known suppliers for mobile phone and broadband services are available in this area. Information regarding broadband options and phone signal can be obtained from the Ofcom broadband and mobile coverage checker. Please contact us for further details.

properties.description:
Located within walking distance of Canary Wharf is this larger than average two bedroom flat.

The living room provides an ideal relaxation space due to the size and the fact that light can flood into it. In addition the wooden flooring and balcony really add to the appeal. The kitchen is open plan onto the reception room which is ideal for entertaining.

The bedrooms are in keeping with the property as they offer ample room and built in storage.

The family bathroom is in great condition and the master bedroom benefits from en-suite shower room.

Heron Quays and South Quay DLR are a short distance as is Canary Wharf Jubilee line and shopping mall with all the bars and restaurants. The Elizabeth line offering further convenient access to central London.

properties.title: Crossharbour Plaza, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
This apartment located in one of Canary Wharf's landmark tower - Arena Tower. Superbly finished with oak veneer wooden flooring, programmable mood lighting, thermostatically controlled central heating, colour video entry phone system, bespoke kitchens and natural marble flooring in the bathrooms. 

The apartment comes fully furnished with a high specification throughout, under floor heating, fully integrated Smeg appliances and built in wardrobes in the bedrooms. The fully furnished apartment, means all you need is a suitcase of your finest clothes and you are set to live in the most prestigious development in Canary Wharf. 

The development offers 24hr concierge service to collect all deliveries and ensure security is constant throughout the year. The gym, pool, boxing and spa area means you will be able to re-energise and stay sharp, with the high tech facilities. The private balcony will allow you to entertain guests or relax with a coffee on a Sunday morning.

Moments away from Crossharbour and South Quay DLR and close to Canary Wharf; means you can easily walk into Canary Wharf or have an easy journey straight into the city; you will be the envy of your colleagues and friends as you effortlessly travel to work. You are right in the hustle and bustle of Canary Wharf, with easy access to the shopping centres, restaurants, bars and all the other amenities Canary Wharf has to offer. Living in Canary Wharf provides you with the single place in London where you have the roar of the city Monday-Friday and tranquillity on the weekends.

Set on a high floor, the spacious dual-aspect (south-east / north-east) living room features floor-to-ceiling windows and enjoys exceptional views across the London skyline. The principal bedroom benefits from built-in wardrobes and a luxurious en-suite bathroom with both a separate shower and bathtub. A well-proportioned second double bedroom is served by a stylish additional bathroom.

The contemporary kitchen is finished with stone countertops and a full suite of high-specification integrated appliances, including an electric oven, induction hob, full-height fridge/freezer, washer/dryer, dishwasher and wine cooler. A breakfast bar neatly connects the kitchen to the living area, creating an ideal space for both everyday living and entertaining.

The apartment is pre-wired for satellite TV and fibre broadband. Residents also benefit from intuitive touchscreen controls for heating, comfort cooling and lighting (with dimming functionality), as well as a video entry system. The building is served by Hyperoptic, offering internet speeds of up to 1Gb.

Ideally positioned, the property is just a five-minute walk into the heart of the Canary Wharf estate and the Jubilee line station, and approximately ten minutes on foot to the Elizabeth line station.

Available fully furnished or part furnished.

properties.title: Indescon Square, London
properties.description:
When you get a spare moment you'll want to come and see this 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment. The apartment of the Indescon Square development where you can sit back and relax on your own private balcony after a long day at the office. 

Enjoy your own paradise of comfort and modernity in the open plan kitchen and living room, where cooking and watching your favourite TV series goes hand in hand. No more London box bedrooms for you, as the spacious bedroom allows you to wake up in style with floor to ceiling windows. 

Sometimes living in the city can be pretty noisy, but living here offers a moment of rare tranquillity amongst the popular business districts, with no busy roads outside your door. The local area provides you with close by shops as well as all the amenities Canary Wharf has to offer. The 24hr concierge are always on hand to help you collect parcels or even just to make you feel safe whilst walking around the development.

Situated only 0.5 miles from Canary Wharf Tube station and 0.4 miles from South Quay DLR, commuting to work, whether you work in Canary Wharf itself or the City, is easy.

properties.title: Turner House, Canary Wharf, London
properties.description:
Set within the ever-popular Canary Central development, this generously sized 2-bedroom apartment is in a greatly sought-after area. 

The living room has sufficient space for entertaining guests, hosting dinner parties or even having a quiet night in with a friend. The kitchen has an open plan style which leads into the living room, spread over three walls to give you sufficient kitchen space to embrace your inner Gordon Ramsey. Coming fully equipped with a built in microwave, oven a built-in fridge-freezer, whether you are a food connoisseur or a regular at the local takeaway, the kitchen has everything you need.  There's no need to faff about with washing up either, as this apartment comes with a handy built-in dishwasher which makes tidying a 5-minute job. 

The two double-bed, fully furnished bedrooms are great if you are sharing with a friend/ colleague or even if you need an extra room for storage. The apartment also consists of two bathrooms, with the master bedroom having an en-suite, so no need for morning arguments about who gets to use the shower first!

Living in this development, you can keep fit in the newly refurbished gym and swimming pool or relax in the spa area. As well as having a concierge available to hold onto any parcels that might be delivered whilst you are out. Situated only 0.5 miles from Canary Wharf Tube station and 0.4 miles from South Quay DLR, commuting to work, whether you work in Canary Wharf itself or the City, is easy. Then arrange a viewing before someone else snaps it up.

properties.description:
Nestled within the iconic Landmark Pinnacle, one of London's tallest residential towers, this sophisticated two-bedroom apartment offers an unparalleled living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf. The development's striking architectural presence and premium positioning create an address of distinction for discerning tenants.

This beautifully furnished apartment showcases premium finishes and fixtures throughout, creating an atmosphere of contemporary elegance. The spectacular far-reaching views encompass the meandering River Thames, the dynamic City of London skyline, and the distinctive silhouette of The Shard, providing a constantly evolving urban panorama that transforms from sunrise to sunset. The thoughtful interior layout maximises both the generous proportions and the dramatic vistas, while abundant natural light floods the living spaces.

The exceptional amenities elevate everyday living to resort-style luxury. The development features a fully equipped gymnasium for maintaining wellness routines, a sophisticated cinema room for private screenings, and two elegantly appointed lounge areas perfect for entertaining or quiet relaxation. Two private dining areas offer intimate settings for hosting guests, while the 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily living with professional support always available.

The location provides immediate access to Canary Wharf's world-class business district, with Heron Quays DLR station and Canary Wharf Jubilee line station both within easy walking distance. This prime positioning connects tenants effortlessly to the City, West End, and beyond, while the surrounding area offers an abundance of high-end restaurants, boutique shopping, and waterside walks along the Thames Path.

The neighbourhood combines the energy of a major financial hub with the tranquillity of riverside living, where modern towers rise alongside historic docks and contemporary developments. The area's continued evolution ensures a dynamic environment that caters to professionals seeking both convenience and lifestyle quality, making this an ideal base for flexible rental arrangements.

The development's striking architectural presence commands attention along the Thames, offering residents an exclusive lifestyle within one of London's most dynamic business districts.

This beautifully furnished apartment showcases modern design throughout, enhanced by the natural light that floods through floor-to-ceiling windows. The private winter garden serves as a tranquil retreat, presenting sweeping views across the Thames that capture the ever-changing rhythm of London's river life. The thoughtful layout maximises the generous proportions, with two well-appointed bathrooms providing convenience and luxury for modern living.

Residents enjoy access to an impressive array of premium amenities that define luxury apartment living. The 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily life, while the comprehensive gym and spa facilities provide wellness and relaxation without leaving the building. The private cinema offers entertainment in sophisticated surroundings, and the residents' bar creates the perfect setting for socialising and unwinding with fellow residents.

Canary Wharf's transformation into a thriving residential and business hub continues to evolve, with Marsh Wall representing some of the area's most sought-after addresses. The neighbourhood seamlessly blends corporate energy with waterside tranquility, offering an abundance of restaurants, bars, and retail destinations. The nearby Crossharbour DLR station provides swift connections across London, while Canary Wharf's extensive transport network ensures excellent accessibility to the City and beyond.

The surrounding area benefits from beautifully landscaped public spaces and waterfront walkways that celebrate the Thames setting. Local amenities include premium shopping at Canary Wharf's retail centres, diverse dining options from casual to fine dining, and cultural attractions that make this one of London's most complete residential destinations.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
This sophisticated furnished two-bedroom apartment occupies a prime position within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, offering contemporary living in the heart of Canary Wharf's dynamic financial district. The development exemplifies modern urban luxury, with sleek architectural lines and premium finishes throughout creating an atmosphere of refined elegance.

The apartment benefits from an exceptional suite of resident amenities that elevate everyday living to resort-style luxury. The private gym and spa facilities provide a sanctuary for wellness and relaxation, while the exclusive residents' cinema offers entertainment at your doorstep. The rooftop terrace creates an elevated outdoor retreat, perfect for unwinding after a busy day, while the residents' bar provides an sophisticated social hub within the building.

The property features two well-appointed bathroom suites, ensuring comfort and convenience for modern living. Being fully furnished, the apartment offers immediate move-in flexibility, making it ideal for professionals seeking a seamless transition to Canary Wharf living. The 24-hour concierge service provides security and assistance around the clock, adding an extra layer of luxury and peace of mind.

Canary Wharf represents London's most vibrant business district, where cutting-edge architecture meets riverside tranquillity. The area pulses with energy during business hours yet transforms into a serene waterside community in the evenings. The nearby Thames Path offers scenic walks along the river, while the district's impressive array of restaurants, bars, and shopping destinations cater to every lifestyle need.

Transport connections are exceptional, with Canary Wharf Underground and DLR stations providing swift access across London. South Quay DLR station offers additional connectivity, ensuring seamless travel to the City, West End, and beyond. The area's transport infrastructure makes commuting effortless while maintaining the exclusivity of waterside living.

This furnished apartment presents an ideal opportunity for those seeking premium rental accommodation with unmatched amenities and location convenience, offering the flexibility and comfort that define modern Canary Wharf living.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

Two double bedroom apartment in the heart of Canary Wharf E14, this spacious apartment comprises of a large reception room with open-plan kitchen area, two double bedrooms, luxury bathroom and large private balcony accessible from the reception. Floor-to-ceiling windows offer an abundance of natural light and give this property the 'wow-factor.'

Residents will be able to enjoy the use of the largest residential gym and leisure facility in London, with a 25 metre pool, fully-equipped cardio suite, sauna and spa pool. Also within the Arena Tower is a split-level brasserie, bar, restaurant, and exclusive private residents lounge with a large screen cinema room.
Arena Tower is ideally situated for transport links into the city and beyond, with easy access to the DLR at Crossharbour (0.1 miles), South quay (0.3 miles) and the Jubilee Line at Canary Wharf Underground Station (0.9 miles).

This property is located just a short walk away from Canary Wharfs many amenities, with a cinema, entertainment, art and event spaces and over 120 stores, including Aspinal of London, Jo Malone, Zara and Waitrose. The area also boasts Michelin starred restaurants and a great selection of bars, many of which boast far-reaching city views.

A stunning two bedroom apartment situated on the 31st floor of this popular development offering communal gym and 24 hour concierge. 

The property boasts modern open plan kitchen to reception room with spectacular views of the River Thames and the City.

The principal bedroom offers built-in wardrobes and an en suite shower room. The second double bedroom is of a good size and also boasts built-in wardrobes and there is a separate family bathroom with shower over bath. 

Landmark East Tower is located in the heart of South Quay and is well located for both Heron Quays and South Quay DLR and Canary Wharf Jubilee Line Station, as well as the bars, restaurants and shops that Canary Wharf has to offer. Residents benefit from a 24-hour concierge service and exclusive access to the renowned Nuffield Health health club, adding convenience and luxury to everyday living.

Positioned moments from Crossharbour DLR station, providing swift and convenient connections to Canary Wharf and the City. Premium apartment situated on a high floor and offering sensational views. The apartment comprises two spacious bedrooms, luxury bathroom, open plan reception with modern integrated kitchen, including Siemens appliances, reconstituted stone work surfaces, glass splash-backs and handle-free storage. properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Situated within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, this sophisticated two-bedroom furnished apartment offers an exceptional waterside lifestyle in the heart of Canary Wharf. The building's contemporary architecture and premium position deliver stunning south-east facing views across the River Thames, flooding the interior with natural light throughout the day.

This beautifully appointed residence benefits from the building's extensive amenities, creating a hotel-style living experience. The 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily living, while the fully equipped gym and spa facilities provide wellness and relaxation without leaving home. Entertainment needs are perfectly catered for with a private cinema for residents, complemented by an elegant residents bar and tranquil winter garden spaces that offer peaceful retreats above the bustling financial district.

The apartment's two bathrooms and thoughtfully designed layout maximise the 893 square feet of living space, while the furnished specification means you can move in immediately and begin enjoying this premium lifestyle. The south-east orientation captures morning light and afternoon river views, creating bright, airy interiors that showcase the Thames panorama.

Canary Wharf's dynamic character combines global business energy with sophisticated waterside living. The area's impressive skyline and modern architecture create a unique urban environment, while the riverside setting provides peaceful walking routes and outdoor dining opportunities along the Thames Path.

Transport connections are exceptional, with South Quay DLR station nearby providing swift access to Bank, London Bridge and Greenwich. Canary Wharf Underground and DLR stations offer Jubilee line services to Bond Street and Westminster, plus DLR connections throughout East London. West India Quay's restaurants and bars are moments away, alongside Canary Wharf's extensive shopping and dining destinations.

This furnished apartment delivers the ultimate in flexible, convenient living, perfectly suited for professionals seeking premium amenities and stunning Thames views in London's most dynamic business district.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.address: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
*Disclaimer - images used are of the same unit on a floor above*

This two-bedroom apartment at One Thames Quay offers a sophisticated blend of luxury, style, and convenience, providing residents with an exceptional living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf. 

The living room is tastefully furnished at the highest standard. The modern kitchen is equipped with state-of-the-art appliances, sleek countertops, and ample storage space, making cooking an enjoyable experience. Large floor-to-ceiling windows bathe the space in natural light while offering stunning panoramic views of the cityscape and the River Thames.

Residents of One Thames Quay enjoy exclusive access to a range of amenities. These include a fully equipped fitness center, a rooftop terrace providing breathtaking views, and a 24-hour concierge service for added convenience and security.

The location of One Thames Quay is highly desirable, as it is within walking distance of Canary Wharf's bustling financial district. The area offers an array of restaurants, cafes, and shops, ensuring there is always something to explore and enjoy.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

The apartment offers an open plan kitchen/ living area with individually tailored bespoke cabinetry and engineered wood flooring, 2 double bedrooms (One ensuite) come with luxury carpets and built in wardrobes, marble effect bathroom, the apartment is finished to a high specification throughout. 

Residents facilities include  Gym, Concierge,  Sky Lounge,  Wellness Suite,  Indoor & Outdoor Play Area,  Games Room,  Dinning room,  Vitality pool, Cinema. Consort Place will offer a beautifully landscaped central plaza, shops, cafes, community and health center and a brand-new Dorset Hotel. Aspen benefits from great transport links with Canary Wharf (Jubilee line), South Quay (DLR) and Heron Quays (DLR) and The Thames Clippers all just a short walk away.

City Tower  is a modern residential development situated in the heart of Canary Wharf, London"s premier financial and business district. This prime location offers unparalleled connectivity, with Canary Wharf Underground Station (Jubilee Line) and Heron Quays DLR Station just a short walk away, providing swift access to the City of London, Bank, and Stratford in minutes. The area is a thriving hub of commerce, luxury shopping and fine dining, with Crossrail Place, Canada Square Park and the iconic Canary Wharf skyline right on the doorstep. Residents also benefit from proximity to the Thames Riverfront, Greenland Dock and South Dock Marina, offering scenic waterside walks and leisure activities. With excellent transport links, world-class amenities and a dynamic urban atmosphere, City Tower E14 9LS is ideal for professionals and investors seeking a vibrant, well-connected lifestyle in one of London"s most prestigious neighborhoods.

The development's striking architectural presence commands attention along the Thames, offering residents an exclusive lifestyle within one of London's most dynamic business districts.

This beautifully furnished apartment showcases modern design throughout, enhanced by the natural light that floods through floor-to-ceiling windows. The private balcony serves as a tranquil retreat, presenting sweeping views across the Thames that capture the ever-changing rhythm of London's river life. Canary Wharf's transformation into a thriving residential and business hub continues to evolve, with Marsh Wall representing some of the area's most sought-after addresses. properties.title: Baltimore Wharf, London, E14 9AQ
properties.description:
Zuker Property is proud to present this modern designed apartment. 

Nestled in the heart of the vibrant Canary Wharf, this stunning flat offers an exceptional level of comfort and convenience. Boasting over 800 sq. ft. of internal space you have two double bedrooms one with an ensuite the other with access to your modern bathroom suite. 

As you step inside, you are greeted by an inviting open-plan living space that is flooded with natural light. The contemporary design and high-quality finishes create an environment that is both sophisticated and relaxing. The spacious living area is perfect for entertaining guests or simply unwinding after a long day, while the floor-to-ceiling windows provide breathtaking views of the surrounding cityscape.

The modern kitchen is equipped with top-of-the-line appliances and ample storage space, making it a haven for any aspiring chef. Enjoy cooking delicious meals and hosting dinner parties with ease.

The two well-appointed bedrooms offer tranquillity and privacy. The master bedroom boasts a comfortable double bed, plenty of storage space, and an en-suite bathroom for added convenience. The second bedroom is versatile and can be easily transformed into a home office or a cosy guest room.

Residents of Baltimore Wharf benefit from an array of amenities, including a 24-hour concierge, a fully equipped fitness centre and a swimming pool. The development also features beautifully landscaped communal gardens, providing a serene escape from the bustling city.

Located in the heart of Canary Wharf, residents can take advantage of the area's world-class shopping, dining, and entertainment options. The nearby transport links, such as Canary Wharf DLR station and the upcoming Crossrail connection, provide easy access to the rest of London, making commuting a breeze.

Residential Links Estate Agents are delighted to present this exclusive two-bedroom dockside apartment, ideally situated in the heart of Canary Wharf, E14. Set within the sought-after Discovery Dock West development, this executive residence offers uninterrupted views of the dock and the iconic Canary Wharf skyline.

The apartment features a bright and spacious reception area, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows that bathe the space in natural light while showcasing breathtaking waterfront vistas. A stylish, fully fitted kitchen comes complete with stone worktops and integrated appliances, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.

There are two generously sized double bedrooms, both with fitted storage, including a luxurious en-suite to the master. An additional elegant three-piece bathroom suite offers further convenience and comfort.

Located in the vibrant South Quay district known as the residential heart of Canary Wharf this apartment benefits from excellent transport links, including South Quay DLR Station and Canary Wharfs Jubilee Line and Elizabeth Line, providing swift access to Central London and beyond.

With a dynamic mix of premium shops, restaurants, bars, and leisure facilities all within walking distance, this is a prime location for professionals seeking a stylish, convenient lifestyle in one of London's most prestigious neighbourhoods.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Located within Landmark Pinnacle at Marsh Wall, this furnished two-bedroom apartment offers an exceptional opportunity to experience life in the UK's tallest residential tower. The development has transformed the Canary Wharf skyline, creating a landmark address that combines architectural ambition with sophisticated urban living. This 905 sq ft apartment captures the essence of contemporary London life, with expansive windows framing captivating views across Canary Wharf's historic docks.

The apartment benefits from a thoughtfully designed layout across two bedrooms and two bathrooms, providing comfortable and flexible living space. Natural light flows throughout, whilst the furnished specification ensures a seamless move-in experience for tenants seeking convenience and style. The property's elevated position within this iconic tower maximises both the dock views and the sense of space, creating a serene retreat above the energy of Canary Wharf below.

Landmark Pinnacle's residents enjoy an impressive suite of amenities that enhance daily life. The 24-hour concierge service provides security and convenience, whilst the first-class residents' gym allows you to maintain your fitness routine without leaving the building. The crowning glory is the communal roof terrace on the 75th floor, offering breathtaking panoramic views across London's skyline—an extraordinary space for relaxation or entertaining that few residential addresses can match.

Canary Wharf has evolved into one of London's most dynamic neighbourhoods, blending global business headquarters with an increasingly residential character. The area offers an exceptional array of restaurants, bars, shops, and cultural venues, all within a modern, meticulously planned environment. From artisan coffee shops to Michelin-worthy dining, the district caters to diverse tastes and lifestyles, whilst Jubilee Park and the waterside walkways provide welcome green space and tranquillity.

Transport connections are superb, with Canary Wharf station on the Jubilee Line providing swift access to Westminster, the West End, and beyond. The Elizabeth Line has further enhanced connectivity, whilst the DLR network offers seamless travel across East London and to London City Airport. This combination of transport options makes the location ideal for professionals working across the capital.

This apartment presents an outstanding opportunity for tenants seeking the flexibility and convenience of a furnished home within one of London's most prestigious residential towers, complete with world-class amenities and unrivalled views.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

Rent: £830 per week
EPC: B
Council tax band: F

Rent is payable on a monthly basis and you may be required to pay more than a month's rent in advance, depending on your circumstances. You will be required to pay a 1 week holding deposit following a successful offer. Utility bills, council tax, telephone line and broadband are not included in the rent. 

As well as paying the rent, you may also be required to make some additional permitted payments. If your tenancy does not qualify as an AST, additional fees may apply. Please visit jll.co.uk/fees for details of fees that may be payable when renting a property.

Residents become exclusive members of The Quay Club, providing 5-star facilities such as a state-of-the-art gym, a 20m swimming pool overlooking South Dock, a business lounge, a screening room, and a private dining room. The 56th-floor bar and terrace offer incredible views of the city skyline. Additionally, the development boasts a 24-hour concierge, on-site security with CCTV, a Bamboo Sanctuary health suite with external hot tubs, and the iGarden - a modern co-working business space with a meeting room and external workspace. There is also a games room with a separate insulated karaoke room and the Sky Meadow, a stunning roof garden.

Located moments from London's financial district, the development stands within 2.6 acres of beautifully landscaped gardens with over 150 new trees, creating an urban oasis. At the heart of the park, new cafés and restaurants by the water's edge of South Dock will provide places to meet and socialise.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
At 75 floors, Landmark Pinnacle is London’s tallest residential towers with views that extend out across London’s unmistakable monuments and waterways.   

Luxurious apartments lead off elegant carpeted lobbies and are beautifully presented in a neutral palette of white walls, timber floors and brushed chrome and black ironmongery.  The feel throughout is simple and sleek, with high-quality furnishings and fittings that complement, without detracting from, the spellbinding views across the water and landscape.

A stand-out feature of many of the residences is a winter garden which can be accessed from the living area and bedroom. It provides space to sit and even comfortably dine outdoors, bringing in the light and views without the accompanying drop in temperature.

As well as a private cinema, State-of-the-art amenities include a stunning 56th floor first class gym with a separate exercise studio and Pilates area. The 27th floor offers a magical childrens play area together with a more formal garden lounge for adults, lounge and library whilst the 75th floor is crowned by two roof terraces offering panoramic views across London.  

Located at the western edge of Canary Wharf, excellent transport connections are available via Heron Quays DLR 0.3 mile, Canary Wharf London Underground 0.5 mile as well as the regular Thames Clippers river service 0.3 mile.

properties.title: Newfoundland Place, London, E14
properties.description:
Choose to rent a home with Vertus. Enjoy a life of ease, closeness and moments you'll never forget.  

Imagine lazy mornings in your waterside apartment, carefree coffees on your sun-soaked terrace. Shared spaces, where you bond with neighbours. Events made for your tastes, in the company of world cultures. Enjoy unmissable moments with those who really get you.  

We're all different, and that's something to celebrate. Find your perfect fit among three distinctive buildings.   Welcome home to Newfoundland.  

Bold design and buzzy energy define life in this Thames-side tower in Newfoundland. Wake up London's striking skyline and winding waterways.  

There's so much more to renting. Enjoy extensive amenity spaces and a programme of curated events hosted in these spaces. With the Vertus+ app our residents also benefit from access to partner perks by neighbourhood brands in Canary Wharf. Fancy a 20% skincare discount, or a drink on us? We have you covered.  

AMENITY SPACES 

- South-west facing terrace with BBQ 
- Gym and Fitness studios 
- Private dining room 
- Residents' lounge and games area 
- "Kidult" area and outdoor children's play area 
- Self-service bar with coffee machine and wine dispenser 

PERKS 

- Monthly exclusives on the residents' app 
- Free Fiit membership - the #1 Rated Fitness App with hundreds of killer on-demand workouts with world-class trainers. 
- Dry cleaning and laundry services 
- Guest suites - fully-furnished suites for residents to book as an extension of their home when hosting more family and friends 

BUILDING 

- Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartments and building - easy to WFH, game, or stream your favourite show without glitches. 
- We have a dedicated team on-site (engineers, concierge, building managers) here to help with any questions you have to make your move as stress-free as possible 
- Pantree honesty market - so you can pick up essential without leaving your building 
- Bring me boxes 
- Apartments furnished by David Phillips 

NEIGHBOURHOOD 

- Feel safe and secure on a private Estate - Canary Wharf.  
- Convenient transport connections -Canary Wharf London Underground Station (Jubilee Line) / 3 mins travel*, Heron Quay station (DLR) / 4 mins travel*, South Quay station (DLR) / 8 mins travel*, Canary Wharf Crossrail Place (Elizabeth Line) / 10 minutes travel* (*approximate travel to stations). 
- Immerse yourself in convenience and culture with 300 shops, bars and restaurants, 100 cultural events per year, and the UK's largest free-to-visit collection of outdoor public art. The Wharf also benefits from over 16 acres of landscaped parks, boardwalks and squares. 
 
 
*Please note that all images, floorplans and particulars included are for illustrative and indicative purposes only. Individual features and layout may vary.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Situated within the iconic Landmark Pinnacle, the UK's tallest residential tower, this exceptional two-bedroom apartment offers an unparalleled living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf. The development's striking architectural presence defines the London skyline, whilst its prime position on Marsh Wall places residents at the centre of one of the capital's most dynamic business and lifestyle districts. The building's contemporary design and world-class amenities create an environment of refined urban living.

This furnished apartment showcases high-specification interiors throughout, featuring premium contemporary furnishings that complement the generous 905 square foot layout. Expansive windows frame captivating views across Canary Wharf and the historic docks, flooding the living spaces with natural light. The two double bedrooms provide comfortable retreats, whilst two luxury bathrooms offer spa-like quality and modern fixtures. The apartment's elevated position enhances the sense of space and tranquility, creating a sophisticated sanctuary above the vibrant streets below.

Residents of Landmark Pinnacle enjoy access to exceptional amenities designed for modern metropolitan living. A 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless day-to-day convenience and security, whilst the first-class residents' gym provides a private wellness facility. The communal roof terraces offer spectacular vantage points across London, creating social spaces where residents can relax and entertain against an ever-changing urban backdrop.

Canary Wharf has evolved into one of London's most sought-after addresses, combining world-leading business facilities with an increasingly sophisticated residential and leisure offering. The area's waterside setting along the historic docks creates a unique atmosphere, with tree-lined promenades, contemporary architecture, and a thriving cultural scene. An impressive collection of restaurants, bars, and cafes cater to diverse tastes, whilst Jubilee Place and Canada Place provide extensive retail options from high-street favourites to designer boutiques.

Transport connections are exceptional, with Canary Wharf station offering Jubilee line and Elizabeth line services for swift access across London and beyond. South Quay and Heron Quays DLR stations provide additional connectivity, whilst the Thames Clippers riverboat service offers an alternative commute along the river. The area's continued investment and development ensure Canary Wharf remains at the forefront of London living.

This apartment offers an exceptional opportunity for those seeking a furnished residence that combines convenience, style, and flexibility in one of London's most connected locations.

properties.description:
Residential Links Estate Agents are delighted to present this exceptional two-bedroom, two-bathroom penthouse apartment in Canary Wharf, E14, located within the prestigious Ability Place development.

Situated on the 21st floor and spanning approximately 1,100 sq ft, this luxury penthouse in Canary Wharf offers an outstanding combination of space, natural light, and modern design. The expansive reception room features impressive floor-to-ceiling windows and opens onto a substantial wrap-around balcony, creating an ideal setting for both relaxation and entertaining while enjoying panoramic skyline views. The living space flows seamlessly into a sleek, fully fitted contemporary kitchen, complete with integrated appliances and elegant stone worktops.

This E14 penthouse apartment comprises two generously sized double bedrooms, including a principal bedroom with a stylish en-suite bathroom, as well as a separate modern family bathroom with a shower over bath. Additional features include ample storage and high-quality wood flooring throughout, enhancing both comfort and practicality.

Residents of Ability Place benefit from a range of premium on-site facilities, including a 24-hour concierge service, a fully equipped gymnasium, Jacuzzi, steam room, and sauna—offering a true luxury lifestyle in Canary Wharf.

Ideally located just moments from South Quay DLR station and within a short walk of Canary Wharf Underground station, this Canary Wharf apartment provides excellent transport links across London. The vibrant heart of Canary Wharf is nearby, offering a wide selection of restaurants, bars, and retail options, including Waitrose and M&S Foodhall.

For outdoor leisure, residents can enjoy the open green spaces of Mudchute Park and Farm, as well as a variety of watersports activities at Docklands Sailing and Watersports Centre, including sailing, canoeing, windsurfing, and paddle boarding.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Situated within the distinguished Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, this beautifully appointed 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offers 893 sq ft of contemporary living space in one of Canary Wharf's most sought-after residential addresses. The development epitomises modern urban living, combining sleek architectural design with an impressive array of resident amenities that elevate everyday life.

Step inside to discover a thoughtfully designed interior showcasing premium finishes throughout and fully integrated appliances that seamlessly blend form and function. The accommodation flows effortlessly, with generous proportions and abundant natural light creating an inviting atmosphere. The standout feature is undoubtedly the private winter garden, an exceptional outdoor retreat offering captivating south-easterly views towards the iconic O2 Arena. This versatile space provides the perfect setting for morning coffee, al fresco dining, or simply unwinding while taking in the ever-changing London skyline.

Residents of Amory Tower enjoy access to an outstanding collection of amenities that rival the finest hotels. The 24-hour concierge service ensures convenience and security, while the residents' gym allows you to maintain your fitness routine without leaving home. Social spaces include a sophisticated cinema and bar, perfect for entertaining or relaxing after a busy day. The crowning jewel is the spa facility, complete with a swimming pool and sauna, offering a sanctuary of wellness within your own building.

Canary Wharf has evolved into one of London's most dynamic neighbourhoods, seamlessly blending business district energy with residential sophistication. The area boasts world-class shopping at Canary Wharf's retail complex, an impressive selection of restaurants and bars, and beautiful riverside walks along the Thames. Cultural attractions and green spaces, including Jubilee Park, provide welcome respites from the urban pace. The neighbourhood's contemporary architecture and waterfront setting create a distinctive character that appeals to those seeking a cosmopolitan lifestyle.

Transport connections are exceptional, with South Quay DLR station moments away and Canary Wharf Underground and Elizabeth Line stations providing swift access across London and beyond. The City, West End, and major airports are all easily reached, making this location ideal for professionals and those who value connectivity.

This fully furnished apartment offers the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and flexibility for discerning tenants seeking a premium Canary Wharf lifestyle with minimal hassle and maximum comfort.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, 10 Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.address: Landmark Pinnacle, 10 Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.description:
Luxurious apartments lead off elegant carpeted lobbies and are beautifully presented in a neutral palette of white walls, timber floors and brushed chrome and black ironmongery. The feel throughout is simple and sleek, with high-quality furnishings and fittings that complement, without detracting from, the spellbinding views across the water and landscape.

A stand-out feature of many of the residences is a winter garden which can be accessed from the living area and bedroom. It provides space to sit and even comfortably dine outdoors, bringing in the light and views without the accompanying drop in temperature.

As well as a private cinema, State-of-the-art amenities include a stunning 56th floor first class gym with a separate exercise studio and Pilates area. The 27th floor offers a magical childrens play area together with a more formal garden lounge for adults, lounge and library whilst the 75th floor is crowned by two roof terraces offering panoramic views across London.

Located at the western edge of Canary Wharf, excellent transport connections are available via Heron Quays DLR 0.3 mile, Canary Wharf London Underground 0.5 mile as well as the regular Thames Clippers river service 0.3 mile.

properties.description:
Available part-furnished or furnished.  Spacious and bright two bedroom apartment on a high floor in popular Discovery Dock West, with a superb outlook towards Canary Wharf the South Dock and Millennium Dome. 

Wooden flooring in living areas and carpeted bedrooms.  Two comfortable double bedrooms and spacious living area with balcony and open plan kitchen with fitted appliances, including washer/dryer, dishwasher, microwave, oven and electric hob.

One en-suite bathroom with shower cubicle, and separate family bathroom, with a shower over the bath.
  
The property is in excellent condition and has been very well maintained. 

The building benefits from 24-hour concierge, and also access to the gym and swimming pool, in Discovery Dock East next door, for a small monthly fee.

Hyperoptic serve the building for fibre broadband with speeds up to 1GB.

Discovery Dock West is a five minute walk in to the center of Canary Wharf and Canary Wharf station (for Jubilee line) for fast access in to central London.  The new Elizabeth line station is no more than a ten minute walk from the apartment, and South Quay and Heron Quay DLR stations are also a short walk.

Council Tax Band E and EPC rating 82(B). Car parking space also available by further negotiation.

properties.title: Cassilis Road, London, E14
properties.description:
Rare 2-bed gem in the heart of Canary Wharf - space, style & resort-level amenities await.

Discover this beautifully furnished, recently refurbished 681 sq ft apartment within the prestigious gated Canary Central development, South Quay, E14. Tucked away in one of East London's most exciting and fast-evolving neighbourhoods, this exceptional home places you at the very heart of London's global financial district - with the gleaming towers of Canary Wharf, world-class retail, and vibrant waterside dining all within easy reach.

The generous double bedroom is complemented by a versatile home office/second room - ideal for professionals working from home or those needing that extra space. A bright, open-plan living area with warm wooden flooring flows into a fully fitted kitchen, all finished to a high standard and offered fully furnished and move-in ready. Water rates are included, making for a hassle-free tenancy from day one.

Step outside and enjoy everything E14 has to offer - waterside strolls along South Dock, 32 acres of green space at Mudchute Park & Farm, boutique cafés on the Isle of Dogs, and over 300 shops, bars and restaurants at Canary Wharf Shopping Centre. Greenwich and the iconic O2 Arena are just 10 minutes away by DLR, keeping London's best entertainment firmly within reach.
What truly sets this home apart is the unrivalled amenity package within the secure gated compound, 24-hour concierge, a swimming pool, Jacuzzi, fully equipped gym, beautifully maintained communal gardens, and two private storage rooms. A lifestyle offering rarely found at this price point in E14.

Getting around couldn't be easier:

South Quay DLR - 2 min walk | Direct to Bank, Tower Gateway & Stratford
Canary Wharf DLR & Jubilee Line - 8 min walk | London Bridge, Waterloo & Bond Street
Elizabeth Line (Canary Wharf) - 8 min walk | Express to Heathrow, Paddington & Liverpool Street
Crossharbour DLR - 4 min walk | Onward connections across East London

Fully furnished. Secure gated development. Water rates included.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
*Disclaimer - images used are of the same unit on the floor below*

At 75 floors, Landmark Pinnacle is London’s tallest residential towers with views that extend out across London’s unmistakable monuments and waterways.   

Luxurious apartments lead off elegant carpeted lobbies and are beautifully presented in a neutral palette of white walls, timber floors and brushed chrome and black ironmongery.  The feel throughout is simple and sleek, with high-quality furnishings and fittings that complement, without detracting from, the spellbinding views across the water and landscape.

A stand-out feature of many of the residences is a winter garden which can be accessed from the living area and bedroom. It provides space to sit and even comfortably dine outdoors, bringing in the light and views without the accompanying drop in temperature.

As well as a private cinema, State-of-the-art amenities include a stunning 56th floor first class gym with a separate exercise studio and Pilates area. The 27th floor offers a magical childrens play area together with a more formal garden lounge for adults, lounge and library whilst the 75th floor is crowned by two roof terraces offering panoramic views across London.  

Located at the western edge of Canary Wharf, excellent transport connections are available via Heron Quays DLR 0.3 mile, Canary Wharf London Underground 0.5 mile as well as the regular Thames Clippers river service 0.3 mile.  

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

Rent is payable on a monthly basis and you may be required to pay more than a month’s rent in advance, depending on your circumstances. An exceptional two-bedroom triplex penthouse, set within a well-situated development in South Quay. 

Arranged over three floors, this unique home combines contemporary design, a thoughtful layout and outstanding views, creating a standout residence moments from Canary Wharf.

To the middle floor, the property offers a well-proportioned living room, a striking and sleek dual-aspect kitchen, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light,  ample storage, perfect for both daily living and access to the roof terrace. 

The main bedroom suite is situated on the top floor of the apartment, benefitting from dressing area and en suite shower room. The second bedroom is located on the lower floor level of  the apartment with dual-aspect windows and a second contemporary shower room.

properties.description:
Choose to rent a home with Vertus. Enjoy a life of ease, closeness and moments you'll never forget.  

Imagine lazy mornings in your waterside apartment, carefree coffees on your sun-soaked terrace. Shared spaces, where you bond with neighbours. Events made for your tastes, in the company of world cultures. Enjoy unmissable moments with those who really get you.  

We're all different, and that's something to celebrate. Find your perfect fit among three distinctive buildings.   Welcome home to Newfoundland.  

Bold design and buzzy energy define life in this Thames-side tower in Newfoundland. Wake up London's striking skyline and winding waterways.  

There's so much more to renting. Enjoy extensive amenity spaces and a programme of curated events hosted in these spaces. With the Vertus+ app our residents also benefit from access to partner perks by neighbourhood brands in Canary Wharf. Fancy a 20% skincare discount, or a drink on us? We have you covered.  

AMENITY SPACES 

- South-west facing terrace with BBQ 
- Gym and Fitness studios 
- Private dining room 
- Residents' lounge and games area 
- "Kidult" area and outdoor children's play area 
- Self-service bar with coffee machine and wine dispenser 

PERKS 

- Monthly exclusives on the residents' app 
- Free Fiit membership - the #1 Rated Fitness App with hundreds of killer on-demand workouts with world-class trainers. 
- Dry cleaning and laundry services 
- Guest suites - fully-furnished suites for residents to book as an extension of their home when hosting more family and friends 

BUILDING 

- Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartments and building - easy to WFH, game, or stream your favourite show without glitches. 
- We have a dedicated team on-site (engineers, concierge, building managers) here to help with any questions you have to make your move as stress-free as possible 
- Pantree honesty market - so you can pick up essential without leaving your building 
- Bring me boxes 
- Apartments furnished by David Phillips 

NEIGHBOURHOOD 

- Feel safe and secure on a private Estate - Canary Wharf.

properties.description:
David Mews presents this exceptional 7th -floor apartment in Landmark West Tower, offering an unparalleled living experience with breathtaking panoramic views stretching across Canary Wharf, the River Thames, and the iconic City skyline. Spanning approximately 850 sq ft, this immaculately presented two-bedroom residence features floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light, complemented by a south-facing open-plan reception room that flows seamlessly onto a spacious balcony perfect for taking in the dramatic vistas. The contemporary kitchen is equipped with integrated appliances, while both generously proportioned double bedrooms boast fitted wardrobes, with the master suite enjoying the added luxury of an en-suite bathroom. Residents benefit from premium amenities including a 24-hour concierge service and a well-appointed gym, alongside the practical advantage of secure underground parking. With its energy-efficient B rating, neutral decor, and prime location mere seconds from world-class transport links and amenities, this apartment epitomizes sophisticated urban living at its finest.

The Landmark Building West Tower at 22 Marsh Wall (E14 9AF) occupies a prime position in London's dynamic Canary Wharf district, offering unparalleled connectivity and lifestyle advantages. Situated just moments from the financial heart of Canary Wharf, this prestigious address places residents within a 3-minute walk of Heron Quays DLR station and a 4-minute stroll to Canary Wharf's Jubilee Line and DLR interchange, providing rapid access to the City (10 minutes), Bond Street (17 minutes via Elizabeth line), and London's global transport hubs. The immediate surroundings boast an impressive array of amenities including the shopping malls of Canada Square, the waterside dining options at South Quay Plaza, and the green spaces of Jubilee Park. The development benefits from its proximity to the Thames Path for riverside walks, while the Crossrail station at Canary Wharf enhances connections across the capital. properties.address: 41 Millharbour, South Quay, Cross Harbour, Canary Wharf, London, E14 9ND
properties.description:
David Mews are happy to present this modern apartment set in the Millharbour development based in the Canary Wharf residential area. The property is located nearby South Quay DLR station, which has direct trains running to Canary Wharf and Bank.

The apartment comprises a good-sized open plan living space with an area for dining, floor-to-ceiling windows leading out to a private balcony, and a fully fitted kitchen with integrated appliances, a good size bedroom with a large wardrobe and storage space. This property has two bathrooms one en-suite and a storage/utility cupboard. Other benefits include wood flooring in the reception and carpets in the bedrooms. The property is offered furnished.

41 Millharbour occupies one of the most coveted waterfront positions in London's thriving Canary Wharf district, offering an exceptional blend of urban convenience and serene dockland living. Situated on the prestigious Millharbour peninsula, this address places residents directly on the edge of a private marina, with picturesque views across South Dock and immediate access to the Thames Path for scenic riverside walks. The development enjoys superb connectivity, being just a 5-minute walk from Canary Wharf's world-class transport hub (Jubilee Line and Elizabeth Line), providing rapid access to the City (8 minutes), Bond Street (15 minutes), and Heathrow Airport (via Elizabeth Line). The immediate area boasts an array of premium amenities, including the shopping malls of Canada Square, the waterside restaurants of South Quay Plaza, and the green spaces of Jubilee Park. With Crossrail Place's boutique shops and the arts hub of the Museum of London Docklands within easy reach, alongside the upcoming Wood Wharf district bringing new retail and leisure options, 41 Millharbour represents a golden investment in one of London's fastest-evolving neighborhoods – where cutting-edge business infrastructure meets waterfront tranquility.

properties.title: Hampton Tower, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Situated on Marsh Wall in the heart of Canary Wharf's dynamic waterside quarter, Hampton Tower represents contemporary dockside living at its finest. This prestigious development combines striking modern architecture with an exceptional array of resort-style amenities, creating a sophisticated urban sanctuary for discerning tenants. The building's prime position offers residents the best of both worlds: the energy and convenience of one of London's most connected business districts alongside tranquil waterside vistas.

This impressive two-bedroom apartment showcases thoughtfully designed contemporary interiors that maximise natural light and capitalise on the property's enviable south and north-easterly aspects. Sweeping views extend across Canary Wharf's iconic skyline and towards the O2 Arena, creating a dynamic backdrop that shifts beautifully throughout the day. The apartment features two well-appointed bathrooms, offering exceptional convenience for modern living, while the furnished specification ensures immediate comfort and functionality for tenants seeking a seamless move-in experience.

Hampton Tower's standout feature is its comprehensive leisure and wellness offering, rarely matched in residential developments across London. Residents have exclusive access to a resort-style swimming pool, spa facilities, and a private residents' bar—perfect for entertaining or unwinding after a busy day. The expansive roof terrace provides an elevated outdoor retreat with spectacular views, while beautifully landscaped gardens at ground level offer peaceful waterside spaces for relaxation. Round-the-clock concierge service adds an extra layer of convenience and security, attending to residents' needs at any hour.

South Quay epitomises the transformation of London's Docklands into a thriving residential and commercial hub. The area seamlessly blends sleek modern architecture with the historic character of the old dock infrastructure, creating a unique urban landscape. Canary Wharf's extensive shopping centre, diverse dining scene, and cultural offerings are moments away, while the waterside setting provides refreshing green spaces and scenic walking routes along the Thames Path.

Connectivity from this location is exceptional, with South Quay DLR station providing swift access across East London and into the City. Canary Wharf Underground station offers Jubilee line services for rapid connections to the West End, London Bridge, and beyond. The emerging Elizabeth line at Canary Wharf further enhances transport links, placing both Heathrow Airport and central London within easy reach.

The surrounding neighbourhood caters to every lifestyle need, from premium supermarkets and high-street retail to an impressive selection of restaurants, bars, and entertainment venues. The proximity to the O2 Arena means world-class concerts and events are practically on your doorstep, while the riverside location provides endless opportunities for outdoor recreation and leisure.

This furnished apartment at Hampton Tower offers tenants an exceptional opportunity to experience sophisticated dockside living with unparalleled amenities, combining convenience, comfort, and flexibility in one of London's most dynamic and well-connected locations.

properties.title: Newfoundland Place, London, E14
properties.description:
Choose to rent a home with Vertus. Enjoy a life of ease, closeness and moments you'll never forget.  

Imagine lazy mornings in your waterside apartment, carefree coffees on your sun-soaked terrace. Shared spaces, where you bond with neighbours. Events made for your tastes, in the company of world cultures. Enjoy unmissable moments with those who really get you.  

We're all different, and that's something to celebrate. Find your perfect fit among three distinctive buildings.   Welcome home to Newfoundland.  

Bold design and buzzy energy define life in this Thames-side tower in Newfoundland. Wake up London's striking skyline and winding waterways.  

There's so much more to renting. Enjoy extensive amenity spaces and a programme of curated events hosted in these spaces. With the Vertus+ app our residents also benefit from access to partner perks by neighbourhood brands in Canary Wharf. Fancy a 20% skincare discount, or a drink on us? We have you covered.  

AMENITY SPACES 

- South-west facing terrace with BBQ 
- Gym and Fitness studios 
- Private dining room 
- Residents' lounge and games area 
- "Kidult" area and outdoor children's play area 
- Self-service bar with coffee machine and wine dispenser 

PERKS 

- Monthly exclusives on the residents' app 
- Free Fiit membership - the #1 Rated Fitness App with hundreds of killer on-demand workouts with world-class trainers. 
- Dry cleaning and laundry services 
- Guest suites - fully-furnished suites for residents to book as an extension of their home when hosting more family and friends 

BUILDING 

- Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartments and building - easy to WFH, game, or stream your favourite show without glitches. 
- We have a dedicated team on-site (engineers, concierge, building managers) here to help with any questions you have to make your move as stress-free as possible 
- Pantree honesty market - so you can pick up essential without leaving your building 
- Bring me boxes 
- Apartments furnished by David Phillips 

NEIGHBOURHOOD 

- Feel safe and secure on a private Estate - Canary Wharf.  
- Convenient transport connections -Canary Wharf London Underground Station (Jubilee Line) / 3 mins travel*, Heron Quay station (DLR) / 4 mins travel*, South Quay station (DLR) / 8 mins travel*, Canary Wharf Crossrail Place (Elizabeth Line) / 10 minutes travel* (*approximate travel to stations). 
- Immerse yourself in convenience and culture with 300 shops, bars and restaurants, 100 cultural events per year, and the UK's largest free-to-visit collection of outdoor public art. The Wharf also benefits from over 16 acres of landscaped parks, boardwalks and squares.

properties.title: Landmark West Tower, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.address: Landmark West Tower, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Positioned within the striking Landmark West Tower on Marsh Wall, this two-bedroom apartment delivers an exceptional living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf's thriving waterside community. The development commands an enviable position within one of London's most dynamic districts, where world-class business, residential and leisure facilities converge to create a truly cosmopolitan lifestyle.

The apartment's defining feature is its spectacular unobstructed views across London's iconic skyline. Residents enjoy sweeping vistas that take in The Shard, the City's architectural landmarks and the River Thames, creating a ever-changing panorama of urban life. The generous proportions and thoughtful layout maximise natural light throughout, while the two bathrooms add convenience and comfort to everyday living. The inclusion of allocated parking is a significant advantage in this central location, offering secure, convenient access for residents with vehicles.

The building's amenities enhance the living experience with a well-equipped resident gym for maintaining fitness routines without leaving home, and a 24-hour concierge service providing security, assistance and peace of mind around the clock. These facilities reflect the development's commitment to delivering a premium residential environment that caters to modern lifestyles.

Canary Wharf has matured into one of London's most sought-after residential addresses, offering a vibrant blend of professional opportunity and lifestyle amenity. The waterfront setting provides scenic routes along the Thames Path, ideal for running, cycling or leisurely walks. The estate is home to an impressive collection of restaurants, bars, cafes and shops, from international chains to independent establishments, alongside cultural venues, farmers' markets and regular events that bring the community together. Nearby parks and green spaces, including Jubilee Park, offer welcome tranquility.

Transport connections are among the finest in London, with South Quay DLR, Heron Quays DLR and Canary Wharf stations delivering swift access to the Underground, Elizabeth Line and DLR networks. The City, West End, Stratford and London City Airport are all within easy reach, making this an ideal base for professionals working across the capital or traveling regularly.

This apartment presents an outstanding opportunity for tenants seeking a well-connected, amenity-rich home with truly memorable views in one of London's most exciting locations.

properties.title: Harcourt Tower, 67 Marsh Wall
properties.description:
"Luxury and Urban Living in Harcourt Tower"

Key Features: 
1. Furnished
2. Dazzling 2 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment located on the 17th floor with stunning views of Canary Wharf south dock.
3. 9-minute walk to Canary Wharf station, 2-minute walk to South Quay DLR Station.
4. Proximity to esteemed universities, UCL School of Management and University of Greenwich.
5. A short stroll to a range of supermarkets including YOHOME Oriental Lifestyle, Waitrose & Partners, and M&S Foodhall.
6. A plethora of dining options nearby including Amerigo Vespucci and Wahaca Canary Wharf.
7. Walking distance to various recreational options including Pinnacle Park, Tiller Road Dog Exercise Area, and Jubilee Park.
8. Nearby premium shopping at Jubilee Place and Canada Place.
9. Pet friendly

Experience luxury and urban living at South Quay Plaza, located in the esteemed Harcourt Tower. This 17th-floor two-bedroom, one-bathroom apartment offers breathtaking views of Canary Wharf dock, bringing the city's magic to your windows. The Canary Wharf subway station is just a short 9-minute walk away, offering easy access to all corners of London.

You will find a range of supermarkets nearby, including YOHOME Oriental Lifestyle, Waitrose & Partners, and M&S Foodhall, offering ample grocery options to cater to your culinary desires. For dining out, enjoy the range of options at your doorstep. Amerigo Vespucci, Wahaca Canary Wharf, and more are ready to serve you a multitude of cuisines.

Pinnacle Park, Tiller Road Dog Exercise Area, and Jubilee Park are nearby, providing ample space for outdoor activities and relaxation. Premium shopping experiences await at Jubilee Place and Canada Place, located just within a few minutes' walk.

South Quay Plaza offers more than just a place to live, it provides a lifestyle of comfort, luxury, and convenience in the heart of London. Make it your home and live the London life you've always dreamed of.

properties.title: Heritage Tower, Canary Wharf, E14
properties.description:
Available Now and fully furnished | Beautiful two bedroom apartment offering dual north and east views in Heritage Tower, E14.

Located on an upper floor, this two bedroom apartment offers the best layout of all the two bedroom apartments offered in Heritage Tower. Developed by Telford Homes, this apartment is bright and airy throughout and makes the already generous 893 Sq.Ft feel even larger. The sleek integrated kitchen offers all the modern appliances you would come to expect from a new build apartment and offers a dishwasher, microwave, induction hob, oven and full sized fridge/freezer.

The welcoming living area is perfect for entertaining family and friends or the perfect setting for a relaxing weekend after a hectic week! The living area is then further elevated from the private balcony which seamlessly flows our from the living room. Both bedrooms are of excellent size with the principal bedroom fitted with luxury carpet and comes with bespoke fitted wardrobe and the second bedroom offering a large free standing wardrobe. Finally, both bathrooms offers plenty of hidden storage with the en-suite offering a walk-in shower and the family bathroom coming with a full sized bathtub and shower.

Residents of Heritage Tower have full access to a 24/7 concierge and an exclusive gym found on the ground floor. Crossharbour DLR station is just a 1 minute walk from Heritage Tower and Canary Wharf is just a 6 minute walk away!

A stunning 42nd floor apartment in the highly sought-after Landmark Pinnacle, Canary Wharf, offering approximately 881 sq ft of internal space and exceptional panoramic views across Canary Wharf, South Dock and the London skyline.

The apartment features full-height floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for an abundance of natural light, alongside underfloor heating, comfort cooling and high-quality modern finishes throughout. The layout is well proportioned, making it ideal for professionals or sharers seeking a premium London lifestyle.

Landmark Pinnacle is one of London’s tallest residential towers, standing at 239 metres, and offers a luxury living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf’s financial district.

Residents benefit from close proximity to Canary Wharf, just a short 7-minute walk away, providing access to a wide range of shops, restaurants, bars and amenities. Transport links are excellent, with Heron Quays DLR station approximately 5 minutes away, offering direct connections to the City, London City Airport and Stratford. Canary Wharf Pier is also nearby, providing River Bus services towards London Bridge and beyond.

This is a rare opportunity to rent a high-floor apartment within one of Canary Wharf’s most iconic developments, offering both lifestyle and convenience in a prime E14 location.

This well presented two bedroom, two bathroom apartment is positioned on a high floor within the sought after The Landmark East Tower development, offering impressive south and east facing views with visible Thames River outlook.

The property features a spacious open plan reception, dining and kitchen area designed for modern city living. Floor to ceiling windows allow for excellent natural light while framing panoramic docklands and river views. The fully fitted kitchen is finished with granite worktops and includes integrated appliances such as a dishwasher, fridge freezer, washer dryer, oven, microwave and hob.

Both bedrooms are well proportioned doubles with built in wardrobes. The principal bedroom benefits from a private en suite bathroom, while a further modern bathroom serves the second bedroom and guests. Hardwood flooring runs through the hallway and reception area, complemented by carpeted bedrooms and tiled bathrooms.
Residents of the development benefit from a 24 hour concierge service and a fully equipped gymnasium. A convenience store is located within the development, providing easy access to everyday essentials.

The apartment is ideally located within walking distance of Canary Wharf, offering a wide selection of retail, dining and leisure facilities across multiple shopping malls. Transport connections are excellent, with Canary Wharf Underground Station approximately 500 metres away, providing fast access to Central London and beyond.

Flexible start date, available from July to August, please contact us for further details.
