properties.title: Amory Tower, 203 Marsh Wall, London E14
properties.address: Amory Tower, 203 Marsh Wall, London E14
properties.description:
Let UK Home are excited to offer this spectacular two bedroom apartment in the heart of Amory Tower, part of the Madison, located in Canary Wharf.

This property comprises a large bright open plan kitchen and living room with great views, two double bedrooms with fitted wardrobes (master en-suite), a large family sized bathroom and ample storage.

The apartment is equipped with a gym, private screening room, swimming pool, private spa, private bar, etc. to meet your daily gathering needs and provide a good place to relax.

The development enjoys a premium geographic location, with a bus stop right downstairs and within walking distance to three major transport lines: the Elizabeth Line, Jubilee Line, and DLR. It is also very close to London City Airport and Stratford International Station, the latter connecting to all Eurostar stations in the UK, making it easy to reach central London and destinations around the world.

South Quay and Canary Wharf underground stations are within walking distance, providing quick access to renowned institutions such as King's College London's Management School, Queen Mary University, London School of Economics, Imperial College London, and other prestigious universities.

The area where the development is located has many landmark attractions, art centers, museums, and theaters, such as London Bridge, the Royal Observatory Greenwich, Canary Wharf Arts Centre, the Museum of London, and the Royal Institute of British Architects, with a strong artistic atmosphere. In addition, there are Chinese supermarkets nearby, such as Tian Tian Supermarket, as well as many Asian restaurants and milk tea snack shops. At the same time, the nearby Canary Wharf has many shops, cafes, and bars, offering everything from branded stores and shopping streets to shopping centers.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Set within Landmark Pinnacle, the UK's tallest residential building, this stunning two-bedroom apartment offers an unparalleled living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf's dynamic waterfront district. Rising majestically above the historic docks, this contemporary residence delivers breathtaking panoramic views that capture the essence of modern London living, with the shimmering waters and striking architecture of Canary Wharf creating a captivating backdrop day and night.

This generously proportioned 880 sq ft apartment arrives fully furnished to an exceptional standard, offering immediate convenience for discerning tenants. The thoughtfully designed interior comprises two well-appointed double bedrooms and two contemporary bathrooms, creating a comfortable and flexible living arrangement. Natural light floods through expansive windows, while the sophisticated finish throughout reflects the building's premium positioning within London's skyline.

Residents of Landmark Pinnacle enjoy access to an impressive suite of amenities that elevate everyday living. The spectacular communal roof terraces on the 75th floor provide an extraordinary vantage point with sweeping panoramic views, perfect for entertaining or simply unwinding above the city. A first-class residents' gym supports an active lifestyle, while the 24-hour concierge service ensures security, convenience, and peace of mind at all times.

Canary Wharf has evolved into one of London's most vibrant and sophisticated neighbourhoods, blending cutting-edge architecture with waterside charm. The area offers an exceptional array of restaurants, bars, and retail destinations, from intimate eateries to flagship stores, all within a beautifully landscaped environment. The Crossrail Place Roof Garden and numerous public spaces provide verdant retreats, while the cultural calendar ensures year-round entertainment and community events.

Transport connections are exceptional, with Canary Wharf station on the Jubilee line and South Quay DLR providing swift access across London. The Elizabeth line further enhances connectivity, placing the West End, City, and beyond within easy reach. For those working locally, the financial district sits on your doorstep, making this an ideal choice for professionals seeking to minimise commute times.

This furnished apartment at Landmark Pinnacle presents an outstanding opportunity to experience London living at its finest, combining architectural prestige, comprehensive amenities, and unrivalled convenience in one of the capital's most exciting locations.

Welcome to Amory Tower - Canary Wharf Living Redefined.

Rising 53 storeys above Marsh Wall, Amory Tower is one of East London's most impressive residential addresses. From the moment you arrive, the standard is clear - this is luxury living with a full suite of world-class amenities designed around your lifestyle.

Unwind at The Madison Spa, featuring a 12-metre heated pool, sauna, steam room, and rain shower, or push your limits in the fully equipped gym with sweeping city views. When it's time to socialise, head up to The Highline Club on the 16th floor - a stunning residents' lounge and bar with an open kitchen, private dining, and three outdoor terraces boasting panoramic views across London.

Beyond wellness and leisure, residents enjoy a 24-hour concierge, secure entry, private cinema and screening room and beautifully landscaped gardens. South Quay DLR is just 0.2 miles away, putting Canary Wharf and the rest of the city within effortless reach. Images for illustration purposes of a similar apartment in the building. 

Amory Tower isn't just a place to live - it's a lifestyle upgrade.

properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, E14
properties.description:
Brand new breathtaking 2 bedroom sky high apartment with views as far as the horizon in a high-spec development filled with every conceivable amenity.

This bright and spacious 42nd floor home comes with 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a staggering east and south-facing river views with dual aspect through its multiple floor-to-ceiling windows.

Set against the iconic backdrop of the Canary Wharf peninsula, Landmark Pinnacle is the tallest residential address in Western Europe, soaring 239 metres into the sky above London's most affluent and dynamic business district. So if you're looking for luxury living in one of the most comprehensive residential developments around you've found it.

Inside this high-spec Pinnacle Residence, you'll find engineered-timber herringbone flooring throughout the living and dining areas, feature stone walls in the bath and shower rooms and brass tap-ware, brushed chrome ironmongery, and white satin finish doors, skirting, and architraves throughout.

As you step through into the spacious entrance hall, you'll find a neatly hidden storage and laundry area also a designer family bathroom, complete with a bespoke vanity unit, a mirrored cabinet, a veneer-panelled bath, and a feature stone wall with porcelain tiling on the floor.

Straight ahead, you'll come to the master bedroom, with a unique enclosed triple-wardrobe dressing area and a south-facing, full-height corner window with far-reaching views out over the peninsula, river views and the nearby Docks.
The master bedroom also comes with its own private en-suite, complete with heated chrome towel bars, a veneer-panelled bath, and a glass-screen, walk-in shower enclosure all of it beautifully finished with porcelain tiling on the walls and floor.

Further down the hallway, you'll come to the second bedroom, with its own south-facing corner window and an extra-wide double-set of integrated wardrobes along one wall.

At the end of the hallway, this high-spec apartment opens out into a bright and spacious open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area. To your left, you'll find a custom-designed, fully integrated kitchen, featuring a full range of Siemens appliances (including a multi-function combination oven, an induction hob and extractor fan, an integrated fridge-freezer, and an integrated dishwasher)  finished in style with reconstituted stone worktops and splash backs.

But the first thing you'll notice is the unmissable view through the east-facing floor-to-ceiling windows stretching almost wall-to-wall along the length of the room. It's the perfect corner-window arrangement to take in the stunning views of Canary Wharf.
Beyond the walls of this luxury, high-spec home, you'll find a wealth of conveniences across the Landmark Pinnacle's 75 floors. As a resident, you'll have exclusive access to:

* A state-of-the-art Cinema on the 1st floor

* A green and lush elevated Park and Garden on the 27th floor

* A fully equipped Gym and Fitness Centre on the 56th floor

* Fine dining and sociable relaxation in the Private Dining Room and Club Lounge on the 56th floor

* And truly breathtaking views through the towering full-height windows of the Club Terrace on the 75th floor the highest private amenity space ever created in London.

Outside this unbelievable development, you'll find Canary Wharf just a 7-minute walk away, with excellent connections to take you all over the city as well as five shopping centres with 120 shops in the Canary Wharf area.

You'll be just 2 minutes from the River Bus at Canary Wharf pier (for a journey on the river to London Bridge in just 12 minutes) and just 5 minutes away from the Heron Quays DLR monorail (for quick trips to City Airport, or to the huge new shopping experience at Westfield Stratford City).

Landmark Pinnacle is one of the most exciting new developments London has to offer and this gorgeous two-bedroom apartment with expansive sky-high views is no exception.

properties.title: Hampton Tower, E14
properties.description:
STUNNING TWO bedroom TWO bathroom apartment, situated in South Quay. Located within the heart of Canary Wharf, moments from South Quay DLR and 5 minute walk from Canary Wharf underground station. This property comprises of an open-plan living room and kitchen, allowing room for a breakfast bar, and includes a microwave oven and dishwasher. There are two double bedrooms both with bathroom suites at their entrance. The principle bedroom benefits from en-suite bathroom with bathtub and separate shower. The apartment comes with a utility space which includes a washer-dryer and storage space.

The apartment comes with underfloor heating and comfort cooling. They are wired for satellite or cable television, with outlets in the living area. There is also broadband capacity throughout the apartments as well as fibre-optic supply.
You can visit the exclusive Residents' Club Lounge on the 56th floor, with bar facilities, board rooms, a screening room and London's highest communal garden. Residents also have a on site gym and a cinema room.

South Quay Plaza is a development truly unique to the Canary Wharf area. Located just a few moments from the heart of London's financial district, it will stand within 2.6 acres of beautiful landscaped gardens and over 150 new trees, feeling like an urban oasis. At the heart of the park, new cafes and restaurants will provide places to meet and socialise, all by the water's edge of the South Dock.

Canary Wharf is possibly London's best- served district for transport. Its under- ground station (Jubilee Line) is only a 600-metre walk from South Quay Plaza. Directly opposite South Quay Plaza is South Quay DLR (Docklands Light Railway) station, only a short journey to London City Airport.

Welcome to Amory Tower - Canary Wharf Living Redefined.

Rising 53 storeys above Marsh Wall, Amory Tower is one of East London's most impressive residential addresses. From the moment you arrive, the standard is clear - this is luxury living with a full suite of world-class amenities designed around your lifestyle.

Unwind at The Madison Spa, featuring a 12-metre heated pool, sauna, steam room, and rain shower, or push your limits in the fully equipped gym with sweeping city views. When it's time to socialise, head up to The Highline Club on the 16th floor - a stunning residents' lounge and bar with an open kitchen, private dining, and three outdoor terraces boasting panoramic views across London.

Beyond wellness and leisure, residents enjoy a 24-hour concierge, secure entry, private cinema and screening room and beautifully landscaped gardens. properties.title: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.address: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
*Disclaimer - images used are of another unit in the building* 

Located at the prestigious One Thames Quay, this striking residential tower stands as one of Canary Wharf's most distinguished addresses, offering residents an unparalleled lifestyle experience in the heart of London's financial district. The building's commanding presence and comprehensive amenity provision create a true five-star living environment, where every detail has been considered to enhance daily life. The development exemplifies modern urban luxury, combining sophisticated design with exceptional service and facilities.

This beautifully furnished two-bedroom apartment showcases contemporary elegance through carefully selected high-end furnishings and a thoughtful layout that maximises both space and natural light. The reception area flows effortlessly onto a private balcony, where sweeping panoramic views extend across Canary Wharf's iconic skyline and the historic docks below, creating a captivating backdrop for everyday living. The modern kitchen features integrated appliances and sleek finishes, whilst both generously proportioned bedrooms benefit from their own ensuite bathrooms, ensuring privacy and comfort. The quality of specification throughout reflects the building's premium positioning, with attention to detail evident in every room.

The amenity offering at One Thames Quay truly sets this development apart from conventional residential towers. The spectacular 46th floor residents' lounge provides an elevated social space with breathtaking views, perfect for entertaining guests or simply unwinding whilst taking in the cityscape. Fitness enthusiasts will appreciate the sky gym, where workout routines are enhanced by inspiring vistas across London. For leisure and entertainment, residents enjoy exclusive access to a private cinema for film evenings and a bowling alley for social gatherings. Beautifully landscaped communal gardens offer peaceful outdoor retreats at ground level, whilst the 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless day-to-day living with professional assistance always available.

Canary Wharf represents one of London's most dynamic and successful urban regeneration stories, transforming from historic docklands into a thriving business, retail, and residential district. The area pulses with energy throughout the day, offering a sophisticated metropolitan lifestyle where everything needed sits within walking distance. The distinctive architecture and waterside setting create a unique neighbourhood character that appeals to professionals and urban dwellers seeking a complete live-work environment.

Transport connectivity from this location is exceptional, with South Quay DLR providing immediate access, whilst Canary Wharf station offers Jubilee Line, DLR, and Elizabeth Line services. This tri-modal transport hub places the City, West End, and both major airports within effortless reach, making the location ideal for those with demanding professional schedules or who value seamless connectivity across the capital and beyond.

The immediate surroundings deliver comprehensive urban amenities, with Canary Wharf's extensive shopping centres offering everything from designer boutiques to everyday essentials. The diverse dining scene encompasses casual eateries, waterside restaurants, and fine dining establishments catering to every occasion. Cultural offerings include art installations, performance spaces, and seasonal events, whilst the nearby Thames Path and dock-side walks provide scenic routes for exercise and relaxation. Supermarkets, healthcare facilities, and professional services complete the convenience of this address.

This exceptional apartment combines luxury furnishings, spectacular views, and resort-style amenities within one of London's most connected and vibrant districts, offering the ultimate in flexible, convenient living for discerning tenants.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

Rent: £833.25 per week
EPC: B
Council tax band: F

Tenancies with annual rents up to £50,000 will require a 5 weeks' security deposit, while those exceeding this threshold will require a 6 weeks' deposit. Modern Furnished 2-Bed Apartment in South Quay Plaza, Canary Wharf

Fantastic location * Superb transport links * Excellent for professionals & students

Welcome to this stylish fully furnished 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the iconic South Quay Plaza, one of Canary Wharf's most desirable residential developments. This contemporary home offers vibrant urban living with panoramic views, high-end finishes, and fantastic on-site amenities.

Prime Canary Wharf Address

Located in the heart of East London's financial district, this property benefits from outstanding transport connections and is perfect for commuting to universities, office hubs, and central London attractions.

Exceptional Transport & Commute Times
* South Quay DLR Station - ~1 min walk
* Canary Wharf Underground & Elizabeth Line - ~5-8 min walk
* Bank (City of London) - ~10 min by DLR/Tube
* Liverpool Street (Tech & Finance Hub) - ~7-10 min by public transport
* Westminster (Central London) - ~11-15 min by Tube

Commuting to Major Workplaces
* Canary Wharf offices - ~5-10 min on foot or via DLR/Tube
* City of London (Bank/Liverpool St) - ~10-15 min commute

Commuting to Universities
* Queen Mary University of London - ~25 min by DLR/Tube
* King's College London (Waterloo) - ~30 min by public transport
* London School of Economics (LSE) - ~35 min by Tube
* University College London (UCL) - ~40 min by Tube

Lifestyle & On-Site Features

This premium apartment is fully furnished with modern décor and includes:
* Open-plan living and dining space with natural light
* Contemporary kitchen with integrated appliances
* Spacious bedrooms with ample storage
* Contemporary bathroom
* Floor-to-ceiling windows with lovely city or dock views

Residents also enjoy exclusive building amenities including:
24-hour concierge
Fully equipped gym & swimming pool
Social lounges and sky terrace
Secure entry and cycle storage

Local Amenities & Lifestyle
* Canary Wharf shopping centre - fashion, groceries & restaurants
* Cafés, bars, supermarkets & local services all within walking distance
* Vibrant social, leisure and fitness options at your doorstep

properties.title: Landmark East Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.address: Landmark East Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Set within the dynamic heart of Canary Wharf, this sophisticated furnished apartment occupies a prime position in the prestigious Landmark East Tower. The development epitomises contemporary London living, offering residents an elevated lifestyle with comprehensive concierge services and exclusive amenities. The apartment benefits from abundant natural light and features a private balcony that provides a peaceful retreat from the bustling financial district below.

This thoughtfully designed two-bedroom, two-bathroom home showcases modern interiors with premium finishes throughout. The open-plan living area flows seamlessly onto the private balcony, creating an ideal space for both relaxation and entertaining. Both bedrooms are generously proportioned doubles, complemented by two well-appointed bathrooms that reflect the apartment's contemporary aesthetic. The fully furnished specification ensures immediate comfort and convenience for discerning tenants.

Residents enjoy exclusive access to a well-equipped gymnasium and professional concierge service, enhancing the convenience and security of daily life. The tower's premium facilities create a hotel-style living experience, perfect for professionals seeking a refined rental property with comprehensive amenities.

Canary Wharf represents one of London's most vibrant business districts, seamlessly blending cutting-edge architecture with extensive retail, dining, and entertainment options. The area's distinctive character combines the energy of international commerce with waterside tranquillity, creating a unique urban environment. The nearby River Thames provides scenic walking routes and recreational opportunities, while the district's numerous restaurants, bars, and cultural venues ensure a dynamic social scene.

Transport connections are exceptional, with Heron Quays DLR station providing swift access across London's transport network. The comprehensive DLR system connects directly to key destinations including Bank, Liverpool Street, and London City Airport, making this location ideal for both business and leisure travel. Additional transport options include nearby Canary Wharf Underground and extensive bus networks.

The surrounding area offers an impressive array of shopping destinations, from the underground retail complex at Canary Wharf to the boutique stores and markets of nearby neighbourhoods. The proximity to both the City and East London's emerging districts provides access to London's most exciting dining, cultural, and entertainment venues.

Positioned within the striking Landmark West Tower on Marsh Wall, this two-bedroom apartment delivers an exceptional living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf's thriving waterside community. The development commands an enviable position within one of London's most dynamic districts, where world-class business, residential and leisure facilities converge to create a truly cosmopolitan lifestyle.

The apartment's defining feature is its spectacular unobstructed views across London's iconic skyline. Residents enjoy sweeping vistas that take in The Shard, the City's architectural landmarks and the River Thames, creating a ever-changing panorama of urban life. The generous proportions and thoughtful layout maximise natural light throughout, while the two bathrooms add convenience and comfort to everyday living. The inclusion of allocated parking is a significant advantage in this central location, offering secure, convenient access for residents with vehicles.

The building's amenities enhance the living experience with a well-equipped resident gym for maintaining fitness routines without leaving home, and a 24-hour concierge service providing security, assistance and peace of mind around the clock. These facilities reflect the development's commitment to delivering a premium residential environment that caters to modern lifestyles.

Canary Wharf has matured into one of London's most sought-after residential addresses, offering a vibrant blend of professional opportunity and lifestyle amenity. The waterfront setting provides scenic routes along the Thames Path, ideal for running, cycling or leisurely walks. The estate is home to an impressive collection of restaurants, bars, cafes and shops, from international chains to independent establishments, alongside cultural venues, farmers' markets and regular events that bring the community together. Nearby parks and green spaces, including Jubilee Park, offer welcome tranquility.

Transport connections are among the finest in London, with South Quay DLR, Heron Quays DLR and Canary Wharf stations delivering swift access to the Underground, Elizabeth Line and DLR networks. The City, West End, Stratford and London City Airport are all within easy reach, making this an ideal base for professionals working across the capital or traveling regularly.

This apartment presents an outstanding opportunity for tenants seeking a well-connected, amenity-rich home with truly memorable views in one of London's most exciting locations.

The property offers a bright and well designed reception room with impressive skyline views and direct access to a private balcony, creating an ideal setting for both relaxation and entertaining.

The open plan kitchen is fully integrated with contemporary appliances and sleek finishes, designed to combine practicality with modern style. Both bathrooms are finished to a high standard with refined fittings, while the two double bedrooms are well proportioned and provide comfortable living space.

Residents benefit from an exceptional range of facilities, including a twenty four hour concierge service, an elegant lounge and library, a private cinema, as well as a swimming pool and fully equipped gym, delivering a premium lifestyle experience.

The development is ideally positioned for excellent transport connections. The surrounding area provides a wide selection of restaurants, retail options, and riverside amenities.
